title: Sprint detail overhaul with canonical task and file timeline
summary: Extends the canonical sprint detail experience with timeline modes, inline compare, URL-plus-local sprint view state, left-rail prefetch, split sprint detail cache slices, summary-first inline drawers, and cross-surface task normalization with optimistic sprint cache patching.
concurrencyRisk: Moderate client-cache concurrency risk around sprint prefetch, optimistic task patching, and paginated timeline views; mitigated by bounded reads, rollback snapshots, mode-aware route state, and targeted sprint-detail slice invalidation.

rollback.strategy: Revert the sprint route, sprint detail payload action, and sprint tab shell together if route hydration, pagination, or lifecycle regressions appear.
validation: npx tsx --test tests/unit/sprint-route-state.test.ts tests/unit/sprint-permissions.test.ts tests/unit/sprint-timeline.test.ts tests/unit/sprint-presentation.test.ts tests/unit/sprint-cache.test.ts tests/unit/sprint-validation.test.ts

commands: npx eslint src/components/projects/tabs/SprintPlanning.tsx src/components/projects/tabs/sprint/SprintHeader.tsx src/components/projects/tabs/sprint/SprintLeftRail.tsx src/components/projects/tabs/sprint/SprintTimelineToolbar.tsx src/components/projects/tabs/sprint/SprintTimelineContent.tsx src/components/projects/tabs/sprint/SprintDetailDrawer.tsx src/components/projects/dashboard/ProjectDashboardClient.tsx src/components/projects/v2/TasksTab.tsx src/components/projects/v2/tasks/TaskCard.tsx src/components/projects/v2/tasks/TasksTable.tsx src/components/projects/v2/tasks/CreateTaskModal.tsx src/components/projects/v2/tasks/TaskDetailPanel.tsx src/components/projects/v2/tasks/TaskDetailTabs/DetailsTab.tsx src/hooks/hub/useSprintViewPreferences.ts src/lib/projects/sprint-presentation.ts src/lib/projects/sprint-cache.ts src/lib/projects/task-presentation.ts
